nodes.languageNotes: Uses git ls-files subprocess calls to enumerate tracked vs ignored paths so the scan is reproducible from repository state rather than raw directory listings.

nodes.name: _git_paths
nodes.summary: Invokes git ls-files under the course root to enumerate tracked or ignored paths, forming the deterministic file universe for the scan.

nodes.name: _scope_for
nodes.summary: Classifies a relative corpus path into course/shared/module/lesson scope based on its directory shape.

nodes.name: _file_entries
nodes.summary: Builds typed SourceManifestEntry records for every tracked file, attaching scope, role, module/lesson ids, and git status.

nodes.name: _has_non_scaffold_file
nodes.summary: Checks whether a directory contains at least one real (non-scaffold, non-ignored) source file.

nodes.name: _gaps
nodes.summary: Core gap analyzer comparing declared course/module/lesson expectations against scanned entries to emit GapEntry records for missing syllabus, module, and lesson material.

nodes.name: scan_course
nodes.summary: Public entry point: loads the course record, enumerates files, and returns a CourseSourceScan bundling the SourceManifest and GapLedger.

nodes.name: models.py
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic record family for course-source ingestion planning: course/module/SME records, source manifest entries, and the gap ledger, all pinned to schema version 0.1.
nodes.languageNotes: All models use ConfigDict(extra="forbid")-style strictness with Literal closed sets for scope and git status, plus a pinned schema_version field validator.

nodes.name: CourseRecord
nodes.summary: Top-level course declaration record binding course details, SME, runtime contract, modules, and source availability, with a pinned schema-version validator.

nodes.name: SourceManifest
nodes.summary: Container model for the deterministic list of SourceManifestEntry records produced by scan_course.

nodes.name: GapLedger
nodes.summary: Container model aggregating GapEntry records that describe missing required course material.

nodes.name: registry.py
nodes.summary: Tiny loader that reads and validates a course.yaml container declaration from a course root into a CourseRecord.

nodes.name: load_course
nodes.summary: Loads course.yaml from the course root and validates it into a CourseRecord, failing loudly when the file is absent.

nodes.name: sme_registry.py
nodes.summary: Per-SME voice/styleguide/attribution resolution layer over state/config/sme-registry.yaml; unknown SME keys hard-fail and unbound SMEs return marked gaps rather than silently inheriting another styleguide.
nodes.languageNotes: Registry loading is lru_cache-memoized with an explicit clear_sme_registry_cache escape hatch for tests.

nodes.name: SmeProfile
nodes.summary: Pydantic profile for one SME: display name, voice/styleguide bindings, attribution, and approval fields with non-empty validation.

nodes.name: load_sme_registry
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the SME registry YAML into an SmeRegistry model, memoized per path.

nodes.name: resolve_sme_key
nodes.summary: Resolves a free-form SME name or key to a canonical registry key, hard-failing on unknown SMEs with the available key set in the error.

nodes.name: resolve_sme_profile
nodes.summary: Resolves an SME name to its full profile, returning marked gap fields for unbound SMEs so callers never silently fall back to a default styleguide.

nodes.name: profiles_diverge
nodes.summary: Field-by-field comparison of two SME profiles reporting which binding fields diverge.

nodes.name: syllabus_metadata.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic syllabus readers (DOCX and MHTML) plus proposal builders that extract course title, learner profile, objectives, and per-module metadata into anchored, source-traceable ModuleMetadataProposal records.
nodes.languageNotes: Every extracted string is wrapped as AnchoredText with a SourceAnchor (path + locator) so downstream proposals stay provenance-traceable; includes mojibake detection on extracted text.

nodes.name: ModuleMetadataProposal
nodes.summary: Pydantic proposal for one module's metadata (title, objectives, suggestions) with a validator requiring source anchors on all proposed records.

nodes.name: _HtmlTableParser
nodes.summary: Minimal HTMLParser subclass that collects table cell text from MHTML syllabus exports for table-driven objective extraction.

nodes.name: read_docx_syllabus
nodes.summary: Reads a .docx syllabus via python-docx into an ExtractedSyllabusDocument of anchored paragraphs and tables.

nodes.name: read_mhtml_syllabus
nodes.summary: Parses an MHTML syllabus export using the email MIME parser and the HTML table parser into an anchored document.

nodes.name: _bucket_suggestions
nodes.summary: Classifies syllabus table row cells into metadata suggestion buckets (readings, activities, etc.) keyed by header labels, preserving source anchors.

nodes.name: _docx_modules
nodes.summary: Extracts per-module titles, objectives, and suggestions from DOCX paragraph structure for the expected module id list.

nodes.name: _mhtml_modules
nodes.summary: Extracts per-module metadata from MHTML table rows, reconciling header layouts and emitting missing-module placeholders when rows are absent.

nodes.name: build_module_metadata_proposal
nodes.summary: Convenience entry point: loads the course record, reads the syllabus file by extension, and delegates to the document-based proposal builder.

nodes.name: build_module_metadata_proposal_from_document
nodes.summary: Builds the full CourseMetadataProposal from an extracted syllabus document, validating expected objective counts and required titles against course.yaml.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Marcus-Intake package initializer (Story 30-1 duality split) exposing the PrePacketSnapshot shape and extract_pre_packet, which lifts pre-packet fields out of orchestrator state for the intake side of Marcus.
nodes.languageNotes: Extensive docstring pins the developer-discipline boundary: Maya never imports this package directly; it exists to isolate ingestion from conversation orchestration.

nodes.name: extract_pre_packet
nodes.summary: Extracts the pre-packet snapshot fields from an orchestrator state mapping into a typed PrePacketSnapshot.

nodes.name: pre_packet.py
nodes.summary: Pre-packet construction and emission for the Marcus-Intake to Irene handoff at steps 04/05: builds irene-packet.md from bundle artifacts (locked 30-2a lift) and wraps it with pre_packet_snapshot event emission via an injected orchestrator dispatch (30-2b).
nodes.languageNotes: prepare_irene_packet is explicitly LOCKED as a byte-identical lift from Story 30-2a; the emission wrapper injects the dispatch callable rather than importing the orchestrator, preserving the intake/orchestrator boundary.

nodes.name: prepare_irene_packet
nodes.summary: Pure file-I/O builder that reads bundle artifacts and writes irene-packet.md for the Irene handoff; locked at Story 30-2a.

nodes.name: _to_repo_relative_posix
nodes.summary: Normalizes an absolute path to a repo-relative POSIX string for stable artifact references.

nodes.name: _build_sme_refs
nodes.summary: Builds SME-related source references for the packet snapshot payload from bundle metadata, hashing referenced files.

nodes.name: prepare_and_emit_irene_packet
nodes.summary: Wraps prepare_irene_packet and, on success, constructs and hands off a pre_packet_snapshot EventEnvelope (with hashed source refs and plan revision) to the caller-injected orchestrator dispatch.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Lesson Plan package barrel (Stories 31-1/31-2/31-3) re-exporting the schema family (LessonPlan, PlanUnit, ScopeDecision, FitReport), event primitives, log write-path, digest helpers, registries, and the ModalityProducer ABC.

nodes.name: blueprint_coauthor.py
nodes.summary: Irene blueprint co-author protocol (Story 29-3): consumes a 31-4 blueprint draft, records Irene + writer approval in a deterministic sign-off sidecar, and returns a PlanUnit carrying a typed blueprint_signoff pointer.

nodes.name: _validate_blueprint_plan_unit
nodes.summary: Guards that the plan unit is actually marked for blueprint handling before co-authoring proceeds.

nodes.name: _load_blueprint_markdown
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the produced blueprint markdown, checking asset paths, review markers, and revision consistency with the plan unit.

nodes.name: compose_blueprint_signoff_markdown
nodes.summary: Composes the deterministic sign-off sidecar markdown embedding Irene and writer commentary with the signing timestamp.

nodes.name: coauthor_blueprint
nodes.summary: Entry point that validates the draft, writes the sign-off artifact, and returns an updated PlanUnit with the typed blueprint_signoff pointer.

nodes.name: blueprint_producer.py
nodes.summary: First concrete ModalityProducer implementation (Story 31-4): emits a deterministic markdown blueprint draft with stable human-review markers for plan units marked for blueprint handling.

nodes.name: _validate_blueprint_target
nodes.summary: Raises BlueprintScopeError when a plan unit is not in blueprint scope, keeping the producer artifact-focused.

nodes.name: render_blueprint_body
nodes.summary: Deterministic offline default renderer producing the blueprint body sections from the plan unit and production context.

nodes.name: compose_blueprint_markdown
nodes.summary: Wraps a rendered body with the stable header and explicit human-review checkpoint markers required by downstream stories.

nodes.name: BlueprintProducer
nodes.summary: ModalityProducer implementation whose produce() writes the blueprint markdown draft and returns a valid ProducedAsset, with an injectable body renderer.

nodes.name: collateral_spec.py
nodes.summary: CollateralSpec content-model family (Braid S1 DP4): the typed spec the client workbook is built from — workbook sections bound to learning objectives, exercises with answer-key source refs, depth-delta contracts, and research enrichment goals.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of Pydantic model_validators to enforce content-model discipline: every section binds a learning_objective_id, every id matches the open-id regex, and research-goal intents are rejected if they look like raw fetch queries.

nodes.name: _looks_like_raw_fetch_query
nodes.summary: Heuristic detector rejecting research-goal intent strings that read like raw search-engine queries rather than pedagogical intents.

nodes.name: DepthDeltaContract
nodes.summary: Explicit declaration of what depth is deferred off the glance-slide into the workbook, with slide open-id and non-empty deferred-depth validators.

nodes.name: Exercise
nodes.summary: Workbook exercise model with open-id exercise ids and a validated answer_key_source_ref shape resolved later by the research wiring.

nodes.name: WorkbookSection
nodes.summary: One workbook section binding a mandatory learning_objective_id and depth-delta contract, enforcing the asset-lesson pairing invariant on collateral.

nodes.name: WorkbookSpec
nodes.summary: Aggregate workbook specification composed of sections and exercises; the single source of truth imported by the workbook producer.

nodes.name: ResearchEnrichmentGoal
nodes.summary: Typed research goal binding an open-id target with an intent that must be pedagogical (not a raw fetch query), consumed by the thin research wiring.

nodes.name: CollateralSpec
nodes.summary: Discriminated top-level collateral spec whose kind discriminant must match the payload shape, emitted on the Irene Pass-1 lesson_plan collateral key.

nodes.name: component_type_registry.py
nodes.summary: Closed-set component-type registry (Story 31-3): the N=2 MVP catalog of composite packages (narrated-deck, motion-enabled-narrated-lesson) built from atomic modalities, with every modality ref validated against the modality registry.
nodes.languageNotes: Widening the closed set requires a schema-version bump, SCHEMA_CHANGELOG entry, and explicit amendment per AC-C.5 — governance encoded in the docstring, validation enforced twice (model validator + lookup).

nodes.name: ComponentTypeEntry
nodes.summary: Registry entry describing a composite component type and its modality_refs tuple, with a model validator requiring every ref to exist in MODALITY_REGISTRY.

nodes.name: get_component_type_entry
nodes.summary: Lookup accessor returning the registered ComponentTypeEntry for a ref, raising on unknown component types.

nodes.name: coverage_manifest.py
nodes.summary: Coverage-manifest verifier (Story 32-2) auditing that every lesson-plan envelope surface in the 05-13 path preserves lesson_plan_revision + digest and gates live consumers with assert_plan_fresh, emitting one canonical coverage-manifest JSON artifact.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Python ast introspection (import-binding resolution, call-site walking) to statically verify that consumer entry paths actually invoke the canonical assert_plan_fresh — a lightweight in-repo static analyzer.

nodes.name: verify_plan_ref_fields
nodes.summary: Checks that an envelope surface exposes the required plan-ref fields (revision + digest) per its plan_ref_mode.

nodes.name: _wrapper_is_live_and_canonical
nodes.summary: AST check that a wrapper function both is reachable (live) and calls the canonical assert_plan_fresh with the expected argument.

nodes.name: verify_assert_plan_fresh_usage
nodes.summary: Parses a consumer module's source and verifies its entry point calls the canonical assert_plan_fresh (directly or via a live canonical wrapper).

nodes.name: summarize_surfaces
nodes.summary: Aggregates per-surface verification results into a CoverageSummary with pass/fail/blocked counts.

nodes.name: _resolve_status
nodes.summary: Resolves a coverage inventory entry to its verification status, consulting sample envelopes, story statuses, and the assert-plan-fresh check.

nodes.name: build_coverage_manifest
nodes.summary: Builds the full CoverageManifest from the story-owned surface inventory, resolving each entry's status and summarizing coverage.

nodes.name: emit_coverage_manifest
nodes.summary: Renders the coverage manifest to canonical JSON and writes the engineering artifact consumed by Story 32-3.

nodes.name: CoverageSurface
nodes.summary: Pydantic record for one audited envelope surface: module path, surface name, plan-ref mode, and verification status.

nodes.name: CoverageManifest
nodes.summary: Top-level manifest model with timezone-aware generated_at validation, surfaces list, and summary.

nodes.name: digest.py
nodes.summary: Canonical-JSON digest helpers (Story 31-1): computes the sha256 of a LessonPlan's canonical JSON serialization (digest field cleared, None keys stripped, sorted keys) and asserts stored digests match.

nodes.name: _strip_none
nodes.summary: Recursively removes None-valued keys from the plan payload so optional-absent and explicit-None serialize identically.

nodes.name: compute_digest
nodes.summary: Computes the sha256 hex digest of the canonical-JSON form of a LessonPlan with its digest field cleared before hashing.

nodes.name: assert_digest_matches
nodes.summary: Recomputes the plan digest and raises when it disagrees with the stored digest field.

nodes.name: drill_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Projects a frozen G0 enrichment card into DrillSpec inputs (Mine 5): read-only card consumption mirroring workbook_enrichment, with no network or model calls and no orchestrator imports.

nodes.name: _safe_id
nodes.summary: Sanitizes raw identifier text into an open-id-safe slug with the given prefix.

nodes.name: project_enrichment_to_drill_inputs
nodes.summary: Transforms an enrichment card's exercises and LO bindings into a DrillEnrichmentProjection of validated drill practice items with source refs.

nodes.name: drill_producer.py
nodes.summary: Renders a DrillSpec to its Markdown artifact family (Mine 5): short practice items only — deliberately no REVOICE pass, no DOCX rendering, and no depth-delta sections, unlike the workbook producer.

nodes.name: render_drill_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders the drill spec (title, LO bindings, practice items with prompts and expected focus) to deterministic Markdown.

nodes.name: write_drill_artifact
nodes.summary: Writes the rendered drill markdown to the output path, creating parent directories and failing loudly on empty specs.

nodes.name: drill_spec.py
nodes.summary: Drill collateral content model (Mine 5): a minimal LO-linked schema of short practice items (prompt + expected_focus + source_refs), kept as a distinct artifact family from WorkbookSpec.

nodes.name: DrillPracticeItem
nodes.summary: One practice item with open-id, prompt, expected focus, and source refs, validated for non-whitespace content.

nodes.name: DrillSpec
nodes.summary: Aggregate drill spec binding a non-empty title, learning-objective ids, and the practice item list.

nodes.name: event_type_registry.py
nodes.summary: Event-type registry and open-string validator (Story 31-1): pins the nine Gagne-9 plan-unit event labels and the reserved log event types, warning (not rejecting) on unknown-but-well-formed event types so extensions surface visibly.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberate warn-don't-reject posture: strings outside the known/reserved sets emit a warning for observability, while regex-invalid strings are hard-rejected. Also home of OPEN_ID_REGEX_PATTERN reused across the content models.

nodes.name: validate_event_type
nodes.summary: Validates an event_type string: rejects regex-invalid values, passes known Gagne-9 and reserved log types silently, and warns once per unknown well-formed type.

nodes.name: events.py
nodes.summary: Event primitives for the Lesson Plan log (Story 31-1, shape only): the generic EventEnvelope every 31-2 log event conforms to, plus ScopeDecisionTransition — the first concrete payload — with a two-level actor surface and audit serialization.
nodes.languageNotes: EventEnvelope enforces UUID4 event ids and timezone-aware timestamps via Pydantic field validators — the schema-checklist idioms from the 31-1 review cycle.

nodes.name: EventEnvelope
nodes.summary: Generic envelope shape for all lesson-plan log events: UUID4 event id, timezone-aware timestamp, event type, writer, and payload.

nodes.name: ScopeDecisionTransition
nodes.summary: First concrete event payload recording a scope-decision state transition with a two-level actor surface and a to_audit_dump serializer.

nodes.name: to_internal_actor
nodes.summary: Maps an external actor label plus optional hint to the internal actor vocabulary used in transition records.

nodes.name: fit_report.py
nodes.summary: Fit-report-v1 validator, canonical-JSON serializer, and emission wiring (Story 29-1); emit_fit_report is contractually callable only by Marcus-Orchestrator — Irene constructs FitReports but never emits them.
nodes.languageNotes: Re-exports the FitReport/FitDiagnosis shapes pinned in schema.py rather than redefining them; the single-writer discipline (Marcus-only emission) is enforced downstream by the 31-2 writer matrix.

nodes.name: validate_fit_report
nodes.summary: Validates a FitReport against its LessonPlan: plan-ref freshness (raising StaleFitReportError), unit-id existence (UnknownUnitIdError), and per-diagnosis invariants.

nodes.name: serialize_fit_report
nodes.summary: Produces the canonical-JSON serialization of a FitReport (sorted keys, compact separators) for stable hashing and logging.

nodes.name: deserialize_fit_report
nodes.summary: Parses canonical-JSON text back into a validated FitReport instance.

nodes.name: emit_fit_report
nodes.summary: Marcus-Orchestrator-only emission surface: validates the report against the plan and appends the fit-report event to the lesson-plan log with plan-ref binding.

nodes.name: gagne_diagnostician.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic Gagne diagnostician (Story 29-2): Irene-authored logic that diagnoses each plan unit's modality fitness, recommended scope decision, and weather band, assembling a FitReport without ever writing to the log.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes a budget-threshold fallback: diagnose_lesson_plan can degrade to summary-only commentary when a per-unit time budget is exceeded, keeping the diagnostician deterministic and bounded.

nodes.name: _normalize_prior_declined_rationales
nodes.summary: Normalizes and de-duplicates prior declined rationales keyed by unit id, rejecting duplicate diagnosis targets.

nodes.name: _derive_fitness
nodes.summary: Derives a unit's modality-fitness verdict from event type, modality-ref registry validity, and any prior declined rationale.

nodes.name: _derive_recommended_scope_decision
nodes.summary: Maps the derived fitness and modality validity to a recommended scope decision for the unit.

nodes.name: _format_commentary
nodes.summary: Formats deterministic human-readable diagnosis commentary per unit, with a summary-only variant for budget-fallback mode.

nodes.name: diagnose_plan_unit
nodes.summary: Diagnoses one plan unit into a FitDiagnosis: fitness, recommended scope decision, weather band, and commentary.

nodes.name: diagnose_lesson_plan
nodes.summary: Diagnoses every unit in a LessonPlan into a complete FitReport, honoring prior declined rationales and a per-unit time budget with summary-only fallback.

nodes.name: learning_objective_adapters.py
nodes.summary: Pure adapter functions (Story G0-S1) bridging the canonical LearningObjective entity to three legacy representations (Irene statements, workbook briefs, collateral sections); each adapter is scheduled for deletion once its last native consumer is rewired.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately the only module allowed to depend on both the canonical entity and the legacy reps, keeping learning_objective.py's dependency graph acyclic and consumer-free for the S3 rewire.

nodes.name: _coerce_bloom
nodes.summary: Coerces free-form Bloom-level text into the canonical Bloom taxonomy vocabulary, defaulting conservatively on unknowns.

nodes.name: from_irene_statement
nodes.summary: Builds a canonical LearningObjective from an Irene-authored objective statement with source refs, Bloom level, and confidence.

nodes.name: from_workbook_brief
nodes.summary: Converts a legacy workbook LearningObjectiveBrief into the canonical LearningObjective entity.

nodes.name: to_workbook_brief
nodes.summary: Projects a canonical LearningObjective back down to the legacy workbook brief representation.

nodes.name: log.py
nodes.summary: Lesson Plan Log (Story 31-2): append-only JSONL write-path with single-writer enforcement via WRITER_EVENT_MATRIX, the LessonPlanLog class (append/read/latest-revision/digest API), the assert_plan_fresh staleness detector, and typed event payload shapes.
nodes.languageNotes: Encodes the R1 amendment-13 single-writer rule as a data matrix (writer identity x event type) checked on every append; log corruption raises typed LogCorruptError rather than degrading silently.

nodes.name: _find_project_root
nodes.summary: Walks up from the module location to locate the repository root used to resolve repo-relative artifact paths.

nodes.name: _validate_repo_relative_path
nodes.summary: Validator ensuring artifact paths recorded in log payloads are repo-relative POSIX paths that stay inside the repository.

nodes.name: SourceRef
nodes.summary: Typed source reference (repo-relative path + content hash) carried in pre-packet snapshot payloads.

nodes.name: PrePacketSnapshotPayload
nodes.summary: Pydantic payload for the pre_packet_snapshot log event: artifact path, source refs, and plan revision, with repo-relative path validation.

nodes.name: LessonPlanLog
nodes.summary: Append-only JSONL log with single-writer matrix enforcement on append_event, corruption-detecting read_events, and latest_plan_revision / latest_plan_digest accessors.

nodes.name: assert_plan_fresh
nodes.summary: Module-level staleness detector comparing an envelope's plan revision/digest against the log's latest values, raising StalePlanRefError on drift; the canonical gate every downstream consumer entry path must call.

nodes.name: modality_producer.py
nodes.summary: Defines the ModalityProducer abstract base class that every concrete modality producer (blueprint, workbook, narration, research) subclasses, pinning a modality_ref and readiness status and exposing a non-mutating produce() contract that returns a ProducedAsset.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses __init_subclass__ to enforce ClassVar contract fields on subclasses at class-definition time.

nodes.name: ModalityProducer
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for all modality producers; subclasses pin modality_ref and status class variables and implement produce(plan_unit, context) -> ProducedAsset without mutating inputs.

nodes.name: modality_registry.py
nodes.summary: Closed-set catalog of atomic producer modality targets (slides, blueprint, leader-guide, handout, etc.) with ready/pending status; widening the set requires a schema-version bump and changelog amendment.

nodes.name: ModalityEntry
nodes.summary: Pydantic entry describing one modality in the registry, enforcing that pending modalities carry a null producer_class_path.

nodes.name: get_modality_entry
nodes.summary: Looks up a ModalityEntry by modality ref, raising on unknown refs to keep the closed-set contract enforced at read time.

nodes.name: produced_asset.py
nodes.summary: Defines the twin input/output payload shapes for modality producers: ProductionContext (minimal produce() input with lesson-plan revision/digest) and ProducedAsset (output carrying a validated 'fulfills' provenance reference), consumed by fanout events and the Quinn-R gate.

nodes.name: ProductionContext
nodes.summary: Minimal input model to ModalityProducer.produce(); a deliberate extensibility seam that producers may subclass for modality-specific fields while preserving lesson_plan_revision and lesson_plan_digest.

nodes.name: ProducedAsset
nodes.summary: Output model of ModalityProducer.produce(); validates a timezone-aware timestamp, a regex-checked 'fulfills' reference, and consistency between the fulfills reference and the source plan-unit id.

nodes.name: prose_uplift.py
nodes.summary: SME-aware workbook prose revoicer that strips REVOICE scaffold markers, rewrites deixis ('this slide' style references), stamps SME attribution from the registry, and measures the before/after delta; idempotent on a second pass.

nodes.name: ProseUpliftDelta
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing measurable prose-uplift results (revoice markers cleared, deixis reduced) with a to_dict serialization for audit reporting.

nodes.name: measure_prose_delta
nodes.summary: Computes a ProseUpliftDelta by comparing revoice-marker and deixis counts between original and uplifted text.

nodes.name: uplift_narration_text
nodes.summary: Core uplift transform: strips scaffold markers and rewrites deictic references in narration text to produce learner-ready workbook prose.

nodes.name: sme_aware_prose_revoicer
nodes.summary: Builds a prose revoicer callable that resolves the SME profile from the registry and applies attribution-aware uplift, for injection into the workbook producer.

nodes.name: quinn_r_gate.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic Quinn-R step-13 two-branch quality gate: blueprint units pass via the Irene+writer sign-off branch, non-blueprint units via the produced-asset quality branch, and out-of-scope units are audited as Declined with verbatim rationale; emits a machine-readable JSON artifact without mutating the plan.

nodes.name: QuinnRUnitVerdict
nodes.summary: Per-unit verdict record for the Quinn-R gate capturing which branch evaluated the unit and its pass/decline outcome.

nodes.name: QuinnRTwoBranchResult
nodes.summary: Aggregate result of the two-branch gate evaluation with a timezone-aware evaluated_at validator, consumed by trial smoke harness and coverage manifest samples.

nodes.name: evaluate_quinn_r_two_branch_gate
nodes.summary: Main gate evaluator: groups produced assets by plan unit, routes blueprint units through the sign-off branch and other in-scope units through the asset-quality branch, and preserves declined rationales for the next diagnostic pass.

nodes.name: emit_quinn_r_gate_artifact
nodes.summary: Writes the rendered Quinn-R gate result JSON to the resolved output root for step-13 auditing.

nodes.name: quiz_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Projects the frozen G0 enrichment card into QuizSpec inputs, preferring quiz-typed components and falling back to assessment-like types; deliberately avoids orchestrator imports to satisfy import-linter contract M3.

nodes.name: QuizEnrichmentProjection
nodes.summary: Lightweight dataclass carrying the quiz-shaped inputs projected from the enrichment card.

nodes.name: project_enrichment_to_quiz_inputs
nodes.summary: Transforms typed enrichment components and citation resolutions into quiz item inputs, selecting quiz-typed components first and assessment-like components as fallback.

nodes.name: quiz_producer.py
nodes.summary: Renders a QuizSpec into Markdown and writes the quiz artifact to disk; a small terminal producer in the quiz collateral family.

nodes.name: render_quiz_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders quiz title, LO-linked items, choices, expected answer focus, and source references into a Markdown document.

nodes.name: write_quiz_artifact
nodes.summary: Writes the rendered quiz Markdown to the target artifact path, creating parent directories as needed.

nodes.name: quiz_spec.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic content model for the quiz collateral family: LO-linked short quiz items with prompt, choices, expected answer focus, and source references — a distinct artifact family from workbook and drill.

nodes.name: QuizItem
nodes.summary: Single quiz item model with prompt, choices, expected_answer_focus, and source refs, validating non-whitespace content.

nodes.name: QuizSpec
nodes.summary: Top-level quiz specification aggregating titled quiz items, with a non-empty title validator; the input contract for the quiz producer renderer.

nodes.name: retrieval_narration_grammar.py
nodes.summary: Pure wording seam that converts a Tracy-style retrieval posture result into a single Maya-facing Marcus sentence describing available research support; performs no dispatch, state mutation, or log writes.

nodes.name: render_retrieval_narration
nodes.summary: Public entry point that normalizes the retrieval posture payload and renders the single Marcus-voiced sentence inviting the next conversational move.

nodes.name: schema.py
nodes.summary: Core Lesson Plan schema primitives (Pydantic v2): PlanUnit, LessonPlan, ScopeDecision, Dials, BlueprintSignoff, FitDiagnosis/FitReport and related shapes — the reviewable contract every downstream lesson-planner story reads and writes against, with verbatim-rationale and red-rejection discipline built into validators.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of Pydantic v2 field/model validators: timezone-aware datetime enforcement, closed-enum red-rejection, and state-machine transitions modeled as methods on ScopeDecision.

nodes.name: Dials
nodes.summary: Per-unit tuning dials model (depth, tone, pacing style controls) that the 4A conversation loop adjusts during scope ratification.

nodes.name: IdentifiedGap
nodes.summary: Model describing a coverage gap identified in the plan, dispatched downstream via step-07 gap-dispatch envelopes.

nodes.name: ScopeDecision
nodes.summary: Scope-decision state machine for a plan unit: validates timezone-aware lock timestamps, guards locking without Maya's rationale, exposes transition_to for legal state changes, and produces an audit dump.

nodes.name: BlueprintSignoff
nodes.summary: Sign-off record for blueprint units carrying a repo-relative artifact path and timezone-aware signed_at, consumed by the Quinn-R sign-off branch.

nodes.name: PlanUnit
nodes.summary: Atomic unit of the lesson plan binding a modality target, verbatim free-text rationale, and scope decision; validators reject 'red' fitness states and enforce scope-state consistency.

nodes.name: LessonPlan
nodes.summary: Top-level lesson plan aggregate with revision bumping and apply_revision semantics that back the stale-revision guard used across the log and orchestrator.

nodes.name: FitDiagnosis
nodes.summary: Per-unit fitness diagnosis model that rejects 'red' recommended states at the schema layer, feeding the Gagne diagnostician outputs.

nodes.name: FitReport
nodes.summary: Aggregate fit report over unit diagnoses with a timezone-aware generated_at validator, serialized and emitted via the fit_report module.

nodes.name: step_05_pre_packet_handoff.py
nodes.summary: Step 05 consumer boundary: typed envelope and consume() entry point through which downstream consumers receive the pre-packet handoff emitted at plan-lock fanout.

nodes.name: Step05PrePacketEnvelope
nodes.summary: Frozen envelope shape carrying the pre-packet snapshot payload into the step-05 consumer.

nodes.name: consume
nodes.summary: Consumes a step-05 pre-packet envelope, asserting plan freshness against the lesson plan log before accepting the handoff.

nodes.name: step_06_plan_lock_fanout.py
nodes.summary: Step 06 consumer boundary: typed envelope and consume() entry point for the plan-lock fanout event received by downstream production steps.

nodes.name: Step06PlanLockFanoutEnvelope
nodes.summary: Frozen envelope shape carrying the locked-plan fanout payload into the step-06 consumer.

nodes.name: consume
nodes.summary: Consumes a step-06 plan-lock fanout envelope, asserting plan freshness before downstream production proceeds.

nodes.name: step_07_gap_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Step 07 consumer boundary: typed envelope and consume() entry point through which identified coverage gaps are dispatched to downstream handlers.

nodes.name: Step07GapDispatchEnvelope
nodes.summary: Frozen envelope shape carrying an identified gap payload into the step-07 consumer.

nodes.name: consume
nodes.summary: Consumes a step-07 gap-dispatch envelope, asserting plan freshness before the gap is handled.

nodes.name: workbook_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: P5-S1 consumption layer that reads the frozen, operator-confirmed G0EnrichmentResult card (typed components, citation resolutions, pedagogy annotations, provisional LOs) and projects it into workbook producer render inputs, so the deliverable is genuinely shaped by the enriched corpus; also loads run envelopes for replay.

nodes.name: WorkbookEnrichmentProjection
nodes.summary: Dataclass bundling the workbook-shaped inputs (further reading, exercises, LO bloom map) projected from the frozen enrichment card.

nodes.name: load_enrichment_card
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the frozen G0 enrichment card payload from disk for downstream projection.

nodes.name: citation_renders_authoritative
nodes.summary: Determines whether a citation resolution is authoritative enough to render into learner-facing further-reading entries.

nodes.name: project_enrichment_to_workbook_inputs
nodes.summary: Main projection entry point that turns the enrichment card into a WorkbookEnrichmentProjection (further reading, exercises, LO bloom map) honoring the honesty bar that every consumed field visibly changes the rendered artifact.

nodes.name: load_run_envelope
nodes.summary: Loads a run envelope from disk with corruption detection (RunEnvelopeCorruptError), providing the replay substrate for lesson-plan, collateral, and research extraction helpers.

nodes.name: workbook_producer.py
nodes.summary: Workbook producer for the braid client deliverable: composes the workbook companion to the narrated deck from transcript segments, LO briefs, exercises, and citations; Markdown is canonical and DOCX is the client deliverable, with numeric/citation fidelity audits and a superset-of-VO coverage assertion.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements the fourth concrete ModalityProducer; dual-render path where Markdown is the citation-injection substrate and DOCX is rendered from the composed model, not from the Markdown.

nodes.name: TranscriptSegment
nodes.summary: Model for one narrated transcript segment (slide anchor plus narration text) that the workbook must cover as a superset.

nodes.name: load_transcript_segments
nodes.summary: Loads and validates transcript segments from the storyboard segment manifest, the narration source the workbook composition is anchored to.

nodes.name: audit_workbook_numeric_fidelity
nodes.summary: Runs the shared L2 numeric-provenance audit over composed workbook prose against the source corpus, reporting numeric drift between deliverable and source.

nodes.name: audit_citation_fidelity
nodes.summary: Audits that every citation rendered in the workbook traces back to a research entry with real source provenance.

nodes.name: assert_learning_objective_bindings
nodes.summary: Asserts every workbook section binds to a declared learning objective, failing loud on orphaned sections or unbound objectives.

nodes.name: compose_workbook
nodes.summary: Core composition routine that assembles the workbook document model from transcript segments, workbook spec sections, LO briefs, exercises, further reading, and research entries, applying the prose revoicer and fidelity assertions along the way.

nodes.name: render_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders the composed workbook model to canonical Markdown, the substrate later citation injection fills.

nodes.name: render_docx_from_model
nodes.summary: Renders the client-deliverable DOCX directly from the composed workbook model (not from the Markdown), keeping the two render paths in lockstep.

nodes.name: WorkbookSidecar
nodes.summary: Sidecar metadata model describing the emitted workbook artifacts (markdown/docx paths, audit refs) for run-envelope bookkeeping.

nodes.name: WorkbookProducer
nodes.summary: Concrete ModalityProducer for the workbook modality: produce() composes the workbook, verifies segment coverage, asserts the workbook is a superset of the voice-over narration, renders both output formats, and returns a ProducedAsset.

nodes.name: dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Internal routing seam on the Marcus-Orchestrator half of the duality: the sole sanctioned caller of write_api.emit_pre_packet_snapshot for Intake-originated pre-packet envelopes, plus a general orchestrator event dispatch path, enforcing single-writer discipline.

nodes.name: dispatch_intake_pre_packet
nodes.summary: Routes an Intake-built pre_packet_snapshot envelope into the Lesson Plan log via the single-writer write API; the only sanctioned emission path for Intake-originated flows.

nodes.name: dispatch_orchestrator_event
nodes.summary: General orchestrator-side event dispatch that validates and appends orchestrator-authored event envelopes to the lesson plan log.

nodes.name: fanout.py
nodes.summary: Plan-lock fanout emitter seam: builds step 05+ envelopes (pre-packet handoff, plan-lock, gap dispatch) from a locked lesson plan and emits fanout.envelope.emitted log events through a caller-injected dispatch callable, preserving single-writer discipline.

nodes.name: StepFanoutEnvelope
nodes.summary: Typed envelope wrapper pairing a target step id with its serialized payload for fanout emission.

nodes.name: emit_plan_lock_fanout
nodes.summary: Builds the full set of step 05/06/07 envelopes from the locked plan (including per-unit gap envelopes) and emits them as fanout.envelope.emitted events via the injected dispatch callable.

nodes.name: hil_intake.py
nodes.summary: Production HIL intake bridge for Step 04A: wraps the operator's pre-collected conversational scope-ratification decisions into an intake callable consumed by FourALoop.run_4a(), plus a confirmed-only lesson-plan log reset helper; keeps internal seam vocabulary out of Maya-visible strings.

nodes.name: MarcusPreCollectedIntakeCallable
nodes.summary: Callable object that replays pre-collected operator decisions per plan unit, raising MissingIntakeDecisionError when a unit's decision was never ratified.

nodes.name: build_hil_intake_callable
nodes.summary: Factory constructing the pre-collected intake callable from operator decisions, ready to be wired into the 4A loop's scope-decision intake seam.

nodes.name: reset_lesson_plan_log
nodes.summary: Deletes/reinitializes the lesson plan log only when the operator has explicitly confirmed, raising LogResetNotConfirmedError otherwise.

nodes.name: loop.py
nodes.summary: The 4A conversation loop: iterates through plan units collecting Maya's scope decisions via an injected intake callable, tunes per-unit dials, syncs reassessment with the Irene diagnostician, and triggers plan lock (and fanout) once every unit is ratified — all behind the single Marcus facade.

nodes.name: FourAState
nodes.summary: Mutable loop state tracking which plan units are ratified versus pending across 4A conversation iterations.

nodes.name: intake_scope_decision
nodes.summary: Records one scope decision for a plan unit from the intake callable, validating the transition and emitting the scope_decision.set event to the lesson plan log.

nodes.name: tune_unit_dials
nodes.summary: Applies operator dial adjustments (depth, tone, pacing) to a plan unit during the conversational ratification pass, bumping the plan revision.

nodes.name: sync_reassess_with_irene
nodes.summary: Runs a synchronous reassessment round with the Irene (Gagne) diagnostician after unit edits, folding refreshed fitness diagnoses back into the loop state and voicing the result in Marcus register.

nodes.name: trigger_plan_lock_if_ready
nodes.summary: Checks that all plan units are ratified and, if so, locks the plan and emits the plan.locked event, guarding against double-lock via PlanAlreadyLockedError.

nodes.name: FourALoop
nodes.summary: Top-level driver class whose run_4a() executes the full ratification loop — emitting plan_unit.created events, collecting decisions per unit, and culminating in plan lock plus fanout.

nodes.name: maya_walkthrough.py
nodes.summary: Release-gate ceremony harness that drives the landed MVP chain through a canned 7-page SME fixture and records stage-by-stage evidence of the Maya journey: paste source, weather ribbon, gray-card click, Marcus delegation proposal, one-sentence rationale, card turns gold.

nodes.name: WeatherRibbonEvidence
nodes.summary: Evidence model for the weather-ribbon stage that rejects red and unknown fitness bands, proving the ribbon rendered only legal states.

nodes.name: CardTurnedGoldEvidence
nodes.summary: Evidence model proving the ratified card transitioned to gold after the operator's rationale sentence landed.

nodes.name: MayaWalkthroughResult
nodes.summary: Aggregate result bundling all six stage evidences with a timezone-aware timestamp validator, the artifact the release gate inspects.

nodes.name: run_maya_walkthrough
nodes.summary: Entry point that executes all six pantomime stages in order against the canned plan fixture, collecting evidence and declined-rationale articulations into a MayaWalkthroughResult.

nodes.name: trial_smoke_harness.py
nodes.summary: Trial-run smoke harness that exercises the full lesson-planner chain end to end — pre-packet intake, 4A workflow routing, step 05/06/07 consumption, Quinn-R gate, and coverage manifest — producing a step-by-step TrialSmokeReport with a trial-readiness battery verdict.

nodes.name: TrialReadinessBattery
nodes.summary: Dataclass of boolean readiness checks the smoke run must satisfy before a tracked trial is declared runnable.

nodes.name: TrialSmokeReport
nodes.summary: Aggregate smoke-run report collecting per-step results and the readiness battery outcome.

nodes.name: run_trial_run_smoke_harness
nodes.summary: Main harness routine that walks the entire chain step by step (packet prep, workflow routing, fanout consumption, Quinn-R gate evaluation, coverage manifest emission), recording pass/fail per step into the smoke report.

nodes.name: workflow_runner.py
nodes.summary: Lesson Planner workflow runner seam for Step 4A insertion: insert_between splices the 4A gate into the step sequence, and route_step_04_gate_to_step_05 drives the FourALoop (optionally from pre-collected operator decisions) and hands the baton to step 05.

nodes.name: insert_between
nodes.summary: Splices the 4A gate step between two existing workflow steps, validating the neighbors exist and are adjacent.

nodes.name: route_step_04_gate_to_step_05
nodes.summary: Runs the 4A gate via FourALoop (wiring pre_collected_decisions when the production HIL intake supplies them) and returns the step-05 baton handoff on successful plan lock.

nodes.name: write_api.py
nodes.summary: Single-writer entry point for Marcus-Orchestrator writes to the Lesson Plan log: type-gates pre-validated EventEnvelopes and enforces the single-writer invariant at entry-point time with a caller-scoped UnauthorizedFacadeCallerError.

nodes.name: UnauthorizedFacadeCallerError
nodes.summary: Caller-scoped error raised when a non-sanctioned caller attempts to write through the orchestrator write API, giving a cleaner surface than the log's last-mile check.

nodes.name: emit_pre_packet_snapshot
nodes.summary: The one sanctioned surface for appending pre_packet_snapshot events: type-gates the envelope, verifies the orchestrator writer identity, and appends to the lesson plan log.

nodes.name: append_event
nodes.summary: Thin sanctioned append path for general orchestrator-authored events onto the lesson plan log.

nodes.name: source_fidelity_audit.py
nodes.summary: L2 numeric-provenance audit (warn-only, non-gating, experimental): measures how faithfully a delivered narration's numeric assertions trace to the source corpus by normalized token matching, returning a drift report without ever raising or blocking.
nodes.languageNotes: Binding warn-only contract: audit_numeric_provenance only returns a report dict and never raises on drift; the sole failure condition is a degenerate zero-token input.

nodes.name: audit_numeric_provenance
nodes.summary: Core audit routine that extracts and normalizes numeric/figure tokens from narration and source corpus (plus research supplements), matches them with nearest-token heuristics, and returns a structured drift report.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: The 07W specialist act node: a deterministic in-graph adapter over WorkbookProducer that self-resolves its inputs from the running run's directory (segment manifest, corpus, Irene's authored collateral as the authoritative workbook blueprint), builds workbook inputs, produces the artifact, and records sidecar refs and economics into run state.

nodes.name: decode_envelope_payload
nodes.summary: Decodes and validates the dispatched envelope payload against the consumed-payload contract before the act sequence begins.

nodes.name: WorkbookInputs
nodes.summary: Dataclass bundling every resolved input the workbook producer needs (plan unit, context, segments, spec, LO briefs, research entries) after self-resolution from the run dir.

nodes.name: build_workbook_inputs
nodes.summary: Resolves the run directory and assembles WorkbookInputs: loads transcript segments from the storyboard-B manifest, maps slides to Gary deck exports, consumes Irene's lesson_plan collateral as the workbook blueprint, and derives plan-unit fields and research inputs.

nodes.name: produce_workbook
nodes.summary: Invokes the WorkbookProducer over the assembled inputs to render the Markdown and DOCX workbook artifacts into the output root.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Graph node entry point: decodes the payload, builds inputs, produces the workbook (or records a skip), and writes sidecar refs, trail entries, and economics back into run state.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Ratchet-D consumed-payload contract for the 07W workbook producer: declares the frozenset of payload keys the act node actually reads (upstream_output trigger, run_dir and output_root overrides), documenting that all substantive inputs are self-resolved from the run dir rather than projected.

nodes.name: source_fidelity_report.py
nodes.summary: CLI that runs the warn-only L2 numeric-provenance audit on a trial run: loads delivered narration from the run's storyboard-B segment manifest and the source corpus slide markdown, then writes the drift report into the run's exports directory.

nodes.name: load_narration
nodes.summary: Loads the delivered narration text by joining the narration_text fields of the run's storyboard-B segment manifest.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point: parses run/corpus arguments, runs audit_numeric_provenance over narration versus source, and writes the JSON report into the run's exports directory.

nodes.name: chooser_html_emitter.py
nodes.summary: Renders the static, dependency-free per-slide Storyboard-A 'chooser' HTML page for Section 07C that a client opens on gh-pages, with a Playwright-stable DOM contract for picking variants and copying an SBA selection code.
nodes.languageNotes: Emits a single self-contained HTML document with pinned data-attribute selectors so an external Playwright driver stays deterministic.

nodes.name: _card
nodes.summary: Renders one variant card's HTML fragment with the Playwright-stable data-slide/data-variant attributes.

nodes.name: _row
nodes.summary: Renders a per-slide row pairing the A and B variant cards for side-by-side comparison.

nodes.name: _script
nodes.summary: Emits the inline JavaScript that tracks per-slide variant selections and builds the copyable SBA-{run_tag} selection code when the operator finalizes.

nodes.name: render_chooser_html
nodes.summary: Public entry point assembling the full chooser HTML document (rows, styles, and finalize script) for a run's per-slide variant options.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: App-namespace Marcus compatibility surface: a tiny barrel re-exporting get_facade so callers import the single Marcus facade from app.marcus.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel for the Marcus CLI bridge: re-exports the ad-hoc ask, gate verdict/override, and trial-launch helpers as the package's public surface.

nodes.name: __main__.py
nodes.summary: python -m app.marcus.cli entry point: builds the top-level argparse tree aggregating trial (start/resume/recover/batch), gate, ad-hoc ask, plan-dialogue, and plan-ratify subcommands.

nodes.name: build_parser
nodes.summary: Assembles the top-level ArgumentParser by delegating each subcommand's flags to its module's parser builder.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses argv and dispatches to the matching subcommand CLI handler, returning its exit code.

nodes.name: adhoc_cli.py
nodes.summary: CLI bridge for one-shot Marcus ad-hoc asks: loads env, optionally overrides the cascade tier, and routes the question through the Marcus facade.

nodes.name: _parse_cascade_override
nodes.summary: Normalizes and validates an optional cascade-tier override string via normalize_agent_name before it reaches the facade.

nodes.name: run_adhoc_ask
nodes.summary: Programmatic entry: obtains the Marcus facade and issues a single ask, returning the structured response payload.

nodes.name: adhoc_ask_cli
nodes.summary: argparse-facing handler for the ad-hoc ask subcommand: wires flags to run_adhoc_ask and prints the JSON result.

nodes.name: capability_grounding.py
nodes.summary: Marcus's 'honesty spine' for the S5 interlocutor: builds a pure, deterministic grounding context from the S4 capability overlay so Marcus answers capability questions from the real dispatch graph, surfacing runtime-precondition blocks and stale-overlay disclosure.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately pure (no model or network calls): staleness and precondition facts are injected by the interactive entrypoint, keeping the module fully unit-testable offline.

nodes.name: RuntimePrecondition
nodes.summary: Model of a runtime blocker (e.g., missing scite OAuth token) that keeps a wired capability from actually running right now.

nodes.name: CapabilityFact
nodes.summary: One specialist's capability fact (state, rationale, routed nodes) with an honest_summary rendering that never up-levels the state.

nodes.name: GroundingContext
nodes.summary: The assembled fact map Marcus's LLM context is anchored on: per-specialist lookup plus a render method producing the deterministic context block.

nodes.name: load_overlay
nodes.summary: Loads the S4-generated capability-overlay YAML mapping from disk.

nodes.name: research_token_precondition
nodes.summary: Derives the live-research RuntimePrecondition from actual scite credential presence so 'wired but blocked pending the research token' is disclosed honestly.

nodes.name: build_grounding_context
nodes.summary: Pure assembler combining the loaded overlay, injected precondition facts, and a stale flag into a deterministic GroundingContext.

nodes.name: front_door.py
nodes.summary: Marcus-SPOC front door (S5): the first conversational turn that presents the curated 3-bundle catalog with honest readiness from bundle_readiness and only returns a FrontDoorSelection on the operator's explicit, confirmed pick — an LLM recommendation is advisory only and unknown bundle ids raise before any selection.
nodes.languageNotes: IO seams (input/output callables) are constructor-injected so offline acceptance tests script the operator turn deterministically.

nodes.name: present_catalog
nodes.summary: Builds the BundleOption list from the bundle catalog, attaching per-bundle readiness verdicts so unproven bundles are flagged rather than hidden.

nodes.name: render_catalog
nodes.summary: Renders the presented catalog as operator-facing text with readiness flags per bundle.

nodes.name: front_door_select
nodes.summary: The deterministic selection guard: validates the operator's pick against the catalog, rejects unknown or non-runnable bundles, requires explicit confirmation, and yields a FrontDoorSelection.

nodes.name: run_front_door
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full front-door turn: present catalog, surface any advisory recommendation, collect and confirm the operator pick, and return the ComponentSelection plus seeds for start_trial.

nodes.name: gate_cli.py
nodes.summary: CLI bridge for the gate verdict and override flow: validates an OperatorVerdict, resumes the paused run via the resume API, and submits/applies cache-aware overrides through the override API.

nodes.name: run_gate_decide
nodes.summary: Validates a verdict payload into OperatorVerdict, resolves the resume command via resume_from_verdict, and wraps it in a CLI transport response.

nodes.name: run_override_submit
nodes.summary: Submits an operator override request through the override API, returning the cache-impact preview and confirm token.

nodes.name: run_override_apply
nodes.summary: Applies a previously submitted override using its confirm token, surfacing stale-token failures as structured errors.

nodes.name: build_parser
nodes.summary: Builds the argparse subtree for gate-decide, override-submit, and override-apply subcommands.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point parsing argv and dispatching to the selected gate/override CLI handler.

nodes.name: _shim_parser.py
nodes.summary: Shared argparse factory for the A2 single-decision gate shims (Story 7a.7): single source of truth for the shim parser shape with the pinned four-section OPERATOR/INPUTS/OUTPUTS/REFERENCE help text.
nodes.languageNotes: Help-text section headers and 8-char underlines are exact-match pinned for grep stability (NFR-OD1).

nodes.name: build_shim_parser
nodes.summary: Constructs the gate-agnostic shim ArgumentParser (verdict file, trial id, runs root) parameterized by gate id, keeping each per-gate shim under 80 lines.

nodes.name: g1_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for terminal gate G1: loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file, validates it, and resumes the paused production trial at G1.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Reads and validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict, then drives resume_production_trial for gate G1, printing structured errors to stderr on failure.

nodes.name: g2b_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for the G2B variant-pick pause point (woken at Arc 2): loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file and resumes the paused production trial.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict and drives resume_production_trial for the G2B pause, with fail-loud error reporting.

nodes.name: g2c_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for gate G2C: loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file and resumes the paused production trial at that gate.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict and drives resume_production_trial for gate G2C, with fail-loud error reporting.

nodes.name: g3_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for gate G3: loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file and resumes the paused production trial at that gate.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict and drives resume_production_trial for gate G3, with fail-loud error reporting.

nodes.name: g4_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for gate G4: loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file and resumes the paused production trial at that gate.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict and drives resume_production_trial for gate G4, with fail-loud error reporting.

nodes.name: g4a_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for the G4A voice-pick pause point (woken at Arc 2): loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file and resumes the paused production trial.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict and drives resume_production_trial for the G4A pause, with fail-loud error reporting.

nodes.name: marcus_interlocutor.py
nodes.summary: The LLM-driven stop-and-chat interlocution REPL (S5): at each paused gate Marcus narrates the real decision card in persona, answers free-form operator turns via the injected chat model, and only after a deterministic guard validates the verb against the gate's allowed set does it confirm and drive resume_production_trial.
nodes.languageNotes: Chat model and I/O are dependency-injected seams: offline tests inject a fake BaseChatModel and scripted input, and any live model call in the offline path raises rather than silently falling through.

nodes.name: StructuredAction
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for the LLM's proposed gate action (verb plus payload) with a parse method that extracts the structured action from a model turn.

nodes.name: ValidatedDecision
nodes.summary: A guard-approved gate decision carrying the validated verb and payload plus a confirm_echo rendering shown to the operator before the engine is driven.

nodes.name: MarcusInterlocutor
nodes.summary: The REPL engine: holds the injected chat model, grounding context, and I/O seams; per gate it narrates the decision card, loops operator turns through the LLM, validates and confirms decisions, drives the resume, and persists the transcript.

nodes.name: validate_action_against_gate
nodes.summary: The load-bearing deterministic guard: checks a proposed verb and selection against the gate's allowed verb set before any engine drive, returning a ValidatedDecision or GuardRefusal.

nodes.name: _system_prompt
nodes.summary: Builds Marcus's persona system prompt anchored on the capability grounding context.

nodes.name: run_marcus_interlocutor
nodes.summary: Public entry that constructs a MarcusInterlocutor for a paused trial and runs the conversation loop to completion or clean error-pause.

nodes.name: _normalize_input_source
nodes.summary: Normalizes the injected operator input seam (callable, iterable, or interactive input) into a uniform line-yielding callable.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Interactive CLI entrypoint wiring real stdin/stdout, live chat model, freshly computed overlay staleness, and runtime preconditions into the interlocutor.

nodes.name: marcus_spoc.py
nodes.summary: Marcus SPOC — the conversational single-point-of-contact operator surface over the production engine: at each gate it narrates the relevant content in persona (sources, ingestion, lesson plan, research, treatment, voice, G0 enrichment), runs the styleguide picker preflight and pick-commit ceremony, collects per-gate decisions, and drives production_runner under the hood.
nodes.languageNotes: The deterministic orchestration engine remains production_runner; this module is the operator-facing narration layer, with decisions supplied as a gate_id-to-verb map (scripted or operator-in-the-loop).

nodes.name: _CeremonyBudget
nodes.summary: Small attempt-budget tracker for the picker confirm ceremony, consuming attempts until exhausted.

nodes.name: narrate_kickoff_beat1
nodes.summary: Renders Marcus's opening kickoff narration for a run: the beat-1 in-persona framing of what is about to be produced and from which sources.

nodes.name: _last_pick_for_course
nodes.summary: Scans the styleguide pick-event ledger for the most recent pick matching the course key, powering the pick recommendation narration.

nodes.name: narrate_research_result
nodes.summary: Narrates the research contribution outcome in persona, including degraded-mode disclosure when retrieval credentials were absent.

nodes.name: narrate_picker_publish_degrade
nodes.summary: Narrates a picker gh-pages publish failure honestly (with scrubbed error detail) and pivots the operator to the inline numbered fallback.

nodes.name: decode_and_echo_pick
nodes.summary: Decodes a pasted picker selection code against the roster and echoes the resolved style guide back to the operator for confirmation.

nodes.name: commit_picker_pick
nodes.summary: Commits a confirmed styleguide pick: validates it is pickable, writes the pick into the run directive, and appends the pick event to the ledger.

nodes.name: _confirm_codes
nodes.summary: Runs the confirm sub-loop of the picker ceremony: reads operator replies, distinguishes confirm/reject/re-paste, and enforces the ceremony budget.

nodes.name: _paste_confirm_commit_loop
nodes.summary: The paste-confirm-commit ceremony for the published picker page: accepts a pasted selection code, echoes the decode, and commits on operator confirmation.

nodes.name: _inline_numbered_pick
nodes.summary: Inline numbered-list fallback for styleguide selection when the published picker page is unavailable.

nodes.name: _degraded_publish_pick
nodes.summary: Full degraded-path pick flow when picker publish fails: narrates the degrade, offers the inline numbered list, and still routes the confirmed pick through the same commit path.

nodes.name: run_picker_preflight
nodes.summary: Pre-start styleguide picker ceremony: loads the roster, surfaces a last-pick recommendation, publishes the picker page (or degrades to inline pick), and commits the operator's confirmed choice into the directive.

nodes.name: build_operator_verdict_kwargs
nodes.summary: Translates a per-gate decision entry (verb plus optional edit payload/selection) into the kwargs for constructing an OperatorVerdict.

nodes.name: _narrate_g0_enrichment
nodes.summary: Narrates the G0 source-enrichment result (component enumeration, dissents, groundedness flags) at the G0E confirm gate.

nodes.name: narrate_gate
nodes.summary: Per-gate dispatcher choosing the right in-persona narration (sources, ingestion, lesson plan, research, treatment, voice, enrichment) for the decision card at the current pause.

nodes.name: run_plan_dialogue_preflight
nodes.summary: Optionally runs the interactive planning dialogue before trial start, threading its ratified artifacts into the run inputs.

nodes.name: run_marcus_spoc
nodes.summary: Main SPOC loop: starts the production trial, then at each gate pause narrates the decision card, resolves the mapped (or default approve) decision, and resumes production_runner until completion.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entrypoint parsing SPOC flags (corpus, decisions file, enrichment mode, picker options) and invoking run_marcus_spoc.

nodes.name: plan_dialogue_cli.py
nodes.summary: Interactive pre-start planning dialogue (Mine 2A): a thin REPL that elicits purpose, audience, workflow, gap-fill choice, and LOs, writes confirm-before-write ratification companions plus ratified-los.json, and persists a transcript — reusing the assess/ratify/write engine rather than rewriting it.

nodes.name: PlanDialogueSession
nodes.summary: The dialogue engine: injected-I/O elicitation of planning answers, confirm-before-write gating, ratification artifact plus ratified-LOs writing, and transcript persistence.

nodes.name: build_plan_dialogue_parser
nodes.summary: Builds the argparse subtree for the plan-dialogue subcommand (corpus dir, output dir, scripted-answers file).

nodes.name: _load_script
nodes.summary: Loads and validates a scripted-answers file (JSON/YAML) into the deterministic input source used for non-interactive dialogue runs.

nodes.name: run_plan_dialogue
nodes.summary: Programmatic entry constructing a PlanDialogueSession over the assessed corpus and running elicitation through artifact writing.

nodes.name: plan_dialogue_cli
nodes.summary: argparse-facing handler wiring parsed flags (interactive or scripted input) into run_plan_dialogue and reporting written artifacts.

nodes.name: plan_ratify_cli.py
nodes.summary: Thin CLI adapter over the planning engine: assesses the source corpus or input bundle, ratifies the planning decision (workflow, gap-fill tradeoff, collateral), and writes the ratification artifacts.

nodes.name: build_plan_ratify_parser
nodes.summary: Builds the argparse subtree for plan-ratify: corpus/bundle inputs, workflow and gap-fill choices, considered-alternatives, and collateral spec options.

nodes.name: _parse_considered
nodes.summary: Parses the considered-alternatives CLI inputs into structured GapFillTradeoff entries.

nodes.name: _load_collateral
nodes.summary: Loads and validates a CollateralSpec from a YAML/JSON file argument.

nodes.name: _assess
nodes.summary: Runs the source assessment, from either a built lesson-planning input bundle or a raw corpus directory.

nodes.name: run_plan_ratify
nodes.summary: Programmatic entry: assess, ratify the planning decision, and write ratification artifacts, returning the written paths.

nodes.name: plan_ratify_cli
nodes.summary: argparse-facing handler translating parsed flags into run_plan_ratify and reporting results.

nodes.name: trial.py
nodes.summary: CLI shim for production-clone trial launches: composes the run directive from the lesson corpus, runs the operator confirm-or-edit loop and picker preflight, then starts, resumes, recovers, or batch-resumes production trials via production_runner.
nodes.languageNotes: start_trial is a 300-line orchestration spine covering directive composition, editor-based confirmation, picker-pick preservation checks, and G0 enrichment prompts before handing the composed run to production_runner.

nodes.name: _resolve_editor
nodes.summary: Resolves the operator's editor command (env vars, sensible fallbacks) for the directive edit step, raising EditorUnavailableError when none is usable.

nodes.name: _confirm_or_edit_directive
nodes.summary: The operator confirm-or-edit loop over the composed directive: accept, open in editor and re-confirm, or decline (raising DirectiveDeclinedError).

nodes.name: _write_cancellation_record
nodes.summary: Persists a cancellation record when the operator declines the directive, keeping the aborted launch auditable.

nodes.name: _default_picker_preflight
nodes.summary: Default seam invoking the SPOC styleguide picker preflight before trial start; injectable so offline tests skip the live ceremony.

nodes.name: _warn_if_pick_dropped_by_edit
nodes.summary: Detects when an operator's directive edit dropped the committed styleguide pick and warns before the run proceeds without it.

nodes.name: start_trial
nodes.summary: The trial-launch spine: validates the lesson corpus leaf, composes and confirms the directive, runs picker and plan-dialogue preflights, resolves the component selection, applies gamma/LLM-mode settings, and starts the production trial.

nodes.name: _resolve_start_component_selection
nodes.summary: Resolves the ComponentSelection for a start: from an explicit bundle id, a ratified lesson-plan selection, or the front-door interactive pick.

nodes.name: start_trial_cli
nodes.summary: argparse-facing start handler mapping CLI flags into start_trial and rendering launch results and errors.

nodes.name: resume_trial
nodes.summary: Resumes a paused trial from an OperatorVerdict file via resume_production_trial, resolving the run directory and verdict payload.

nodes.name: recover_trial
nodes.summary: Recovers an error-paused trial from its persisted checkpoint via recover_production_trial, replaying from the last durable state.

nodes.name: resume_batch_trial
nodes.summary: Resumes a trial paused on a provider batch wait via resume_batch_production_trial (opt-in batch LLM execution mode).

nodes.name: build_trial_parser
nodes.summary: Builds the full argparse subtree for trial start/resume/recover/resume-batch, including directive, picker, enrichment, gamma-settings, and batch-mode flags.

nodes.name: canonical_processed_source.py
nodes.summary: Canonical processed-source contract and validators (Mine 4A): enforces the ratified lesson-leaf layout (slides/references/assessments), the run-dir layout (bundle/extracted.md, g0-enrichment.json), and the closed AssetKind shape-pin on enrichment nodes.

nodes.name: CanonicalValidationResult
nodes.summary: Accumulated validation outcome (errors, digests, checked paths) with raise_if_failed fail-loud semantics and a to_dict serialization.

nodes.name: resolve_asset_kind
nodes.summary: Maps a typed component's source type to its canonical AssetKind via the reconciliation table.

nodes.name: validate_lesson_leaf
nodes.summary: Validates a lesson-leaf directory against the greenlit slides/references/assessments layout, collecting digest evidence per file.

nodes.name: _enrichment_kind_errors
nodes.summary: Checks every enrichment node in g0-enrichment.json for a valid closed-set AssetKind, returning shape-pin violations.

nodes.name: validate_run_dir
nodes.summary: Validates a run directory: bundle/extracted.md presence, enrichment card presence, and enrichment kind shape-pins.

nodes.name: validate_canonical_tree
nodes.summary: Composite validator running lesson-leaf and run-dir validation as one canonical-tree check.

nodes.name: annotate_typed_components_with_kind
nodes.summary: Annotates typed components with their resolved AssetKind so downstream consumers read the closed kind directly.

nodes.name: write_canonical_contract_doc
nodes.summary: Emits the human-readable canonical-contract markdown documenting the enforced layout and kind rules.

nodes.name: facade.py
nodes.summary: The single Maya-facing Marcus facade: hides the Story 30-1 duality split behind one surface whose every Maya-visible string honors the binding voice register (first person, present tense, no hedges, no meta), with a module-level singleton via get_facade/reset_facade.
nodes.languageNotes: Internal routing identifiers never surface in Maya-visible strings; the one-voice rule is enforced by a dedicated leak test.

nodes.name: Facade
nodes.summary: The facade class exposing marcus_identity, run_step, ask, and run_4a as the one Marcus surface, internally routing to the manifest-compiled runtime, chat-model adapter, and run state.

nodes.name: _adhoc_trace_env
nodes.summary: Derives the LangSmith tracing environment context for ad-hoc facade asks.

nodes.name: _resolve_activation_allowlist
nodes.summary: Resolves which agent activations the facade permits, guarding the surface against unexpected routing.

nodes.name: _read_marcus_sanctum_digest
nodes.summary: Reads and fingerprints the Marcus sanctum artifacts so identity responses are bound to the actual persona state on disk.

nodes.name: get_facade
nodes.summary: Module-level singleton accessor constructing (once) and returning the shared Facade instance.

nodes.name: bundle_catalog.py
nodes.summary: Curated bundle catalog (S4): the 3 ratified bundles as frozen declarative records over ComponentSelection, each component carrying an honesty CapabilityTier seeded from current reality; bundle readiness is the worst-wins minimum tier the S5 front door uses to flag unproven bundles.
nodes.languageNotes: Closed sets (BundleId, CapabilityTier, BundleReadiness) are Pydantic-v2 closed-enum models wrapped in types.MappingProxyType; widening any set is a governance act, not a runtime flag.

nodes.name: ComponentCapability
nodes.summary: Per-component capability record binding a component to its honesty tier (proven_wired, proven_regressed_repairable, mechanism_only_never_produced, ...).

nodes.name: BundleRecord
nodes.summary: A blessed bundle: named ComponentSelection plus display metadata and required inputs, with a validator ensuring every selected component has a capability tier.

nodes.name: get_bundle
nodes.summary: Looks up a BundleRecord by its ratified bundle id from the frozen catalog.

nodes.name: min_capability_tier
nodes.summary: Computes the worst-wins minimum capability tier across a bundle's selected components.

nodes.name: bundle_readiness
nodes.summary: Maps a bundle's minimum capability tier to its front-door readiness verdict (fully_proven / partial / not_yet).

nodes.name: collateral_selection.py
nodes.summary: The selection edge from a ratified lesson-plan collateral intent to a curated ComponentSelection: reads the local ratified intent, resolves it through the bundle catalog, validates the bundle/collateral pairing, and returns the blessed selection for the production runner.

nodes.name: RatifiedLessonPlanCollateralIntent
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of the ratified collateral intent, with a validator rejecting remote source refs so only local ratified artifacts drive selection.

nodes.name: _bundle_from_intent
nodes.summary: Resolves the ratified intent's requested collateral to a catalog bundle id, defaulting to narrated-deck-with-motion when unspecified.

nodes.name: _validate_bundle_collateral_pair
nodes.summary: Asserts the resolved bundle actually delivers the collateral the intent asked for, failing loud on mismatches.

nodes.name: resolve_lesson_plan_collateral_selection
nodes.summary: Main resolver: takes a ratified collateral intent, resolves and validates the bundle, and returns the catalog's blessed ResolvedCollateralSelection.

nodes.name: load_lesson_plan_collateral_selection
nodes.summary: Loads a ratified intent file from disk and resolves it into the blessed ComponentSelection.

nodes.name: derive_selection_from_lesson_plan
nodes.summary: Derives the collateral selection directly from a ratified lesson-plan structure (asset plan items), mapping planned assets to catalog bundles.

nodes.name: load_selection_from_lesson_plan_json
nodes.summary: Loads a ratified lesson-plan JSON file and derives the blessed selection from it.

nodes.name: coverage_annotation.py
nodes.summary: The authored side of the coverage interlock (T4): builds one CoverageAnnotation per note-bearing component carrying re-segmented SourcePoint assertions, via a deterministic offline pass or a live gpt-5 segmentation leg where the LLM only cuts verbatim spans — risk flags and coverage intents are always assigned deterministically.
nodes.languageNotes: Live-leg harness discipline is T0-spike-proven: hard per-request OpenAI timeout with max_retries=0, generous max_completion_tokens, reasoning_effort=low; the module must not import g0_enrichment at runtime (layered via repin_additive instead).

nodes.name: CoverageAnnotation
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of a component's coverage annotation (source points, provenance, timestamps) with block invariants and a v1-shippability check.

nodes.name: NonVerbatimSpan
nodes.summary: Diagnostic record for a claimed verbatim span that does not actually appear in the source text after normalization.

nodes.name: detect_risk_flags
nodes.summary: Deterministic risk detector assigning flags (figures, numbers, citations, etc.) to a text span — never delegated to the LLM.

nodes.name: assert_v1_shippable
nodes.summary: Raises CoverageNotShippableError unless the annotation set meets the v1 shippability bar.

nodes.name: detect_incomplete_segmentation
nodes.summary: Finds source regions the segmentation pass failed to cover, returning IncompleteSegment diagnostics.

nodes.name: assert_segmentation_complete
nodes.summary: Raises CoverageIncompleteError with the offending segments when segmentation left source content uncovered.

nodes.name: reanchor_verbatim_span
nodes.summary: Re-anchors a claimed verbatim span onto the actual source text, tolerating quote-straightening and whitespace drift.

nodes.name: detect_non_verbatim_spans
nodes.summary: Scans annotations for spans that fail verbatim re-anchoring, emitting NonVerbatimSpan diagnostics since the model paraphrase is never trusted.

nodes.name: _point_from_span
nodes.summary: Converts a cut span into a SourcePoint with deterministic id, risk flags, coverage intents, and slide-key locator.

nodes.name: _annotation_from_spans
nodes.summary: Assembles a component's CoverageAnnotation from its cut spans, enforcing the per-block assertion ceiling.

nodes.name: extract_coverage_rows
nodes.summary: Extracts the note-bearing component rows (id, type, locator, excerpt, slide key) from the enrichment result that the coverage pass will segment.

nodes.name: build_coverage_from_rows
nodes.summary: Core builder running the offline or live segmentation over extracted rows and producing validated CoverageAnnotation objects with completeness checks.

nodes.name: render_live_segmentation_prompt
nodes.summary: Renders the constrained gpt-5 segmentation prompt instructing the model to cut verbatim spans only.

nodes.name: _live_coverage_pass
nodes.summary: The live gpt-5 segmentation leg: per-request-timeout client, parses the model's span cuts, and re-anchors them verbatim before any use.

nodes.name: build_coverage_annotations
nodes.summary: Top-level entry mirroring build_pedagogy_annotations: extracts rows from the enrichment result and builds coverage annotations in the requested mode (offline default, live at T8).

nodes.name: coverage_gate.py
nodes.summary: Neutral fail-loud coverage gate logic (T6): blocks the run before any audio spend when a must-cover source point is missing from both deck and narration with no planned surface; fuzzy statuses stay warn/ledger-only during calibration.

nodes.name: CoverageAssuranceError
nodes.summary: Fail-loud coverage gate error; subclasses SpecialistDispatchError so the runner routes it through the existing _pause_at_error channel before audio spend.

nodes.name: _is_blocking
nodes.summary: Determines whether a receipt row is a deterministically-certain blocking failure (must-cover missing or verbatim-absent with no planned surface).

nodes.name: evaluate_coverage_gate
nodes.summary: Public gate-evaluation entry point returning the blocking rows for a derived coverage receipt.

nodes.name: coverage_warnings
nodes.summary: Collects warn-only ledger rows (altered/risky, low-confidence judgments) that do not halt the run during the calibration window.

nodes.name: evaluate_vacuous_receipt
nodes.summary: Detects vacuous receipts (no note-bearing rows or empty must-cover set) so an empty receipt cannot silently pass the gate.

nodes.name: assert_receipt_not_vacuous
nodes.summary: Raises CoverageAssuranceError when the derived receipt is vacuous.

nodes.name: assert_coverage_gate
nodes.summary: Raises CoverageAssuranceError with the blocking rows when the coverage gate fails; the single fail-loud enforcement surface.

nodes.name: coverage_receipt.py
